text:
On Sun, Mar 22, 2009 at 1:38 PM, Emanuel Haupt <ehaupt@critical.ch> wrote:
> Hi
>
> largefile support is enabled by default. Could you show me your
> config.log after building rsync from ports?
>
> Emanuel
>

I wasn't very thorough in testing, just rsyncing a large file (over 2
gigs) to this laptop would fail, I recompiled rsync with
--enable-largefile out it worked. attached is the config.log

-- 
And what is good, Phaedrus,
And what is not goodâ
Need we ask anyone to tell us these things?
